title: zerna madritensis
intro: Zerna madritensis, also known as Spanish needlegrass or Zerna, is a type of grass native to Europe, North Africa, and parts of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Zerna madritensis include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and even aid in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
